content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://9021fdc6-0afa-473e-b60c-1dbccce51d7c.filesusr.com/ugd/84a06c_290bda798b6949ab879ead6b6b23f93b.pdf?index=true", "source_title": "[PDF] Enhancement of resistance against damp heat aging through ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "According to the general consensus within the PV industry, PEVA as an encapsulant should have VA content b etween 28 and 33%.", "direct_quote": "According to the general consensus within the PV industry, PEVA as an encapsulant should have VA content b etween 28 and 33%.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "PEVA films containing 18, 24, 33, and 40% VA content with t he necessary additives have been fabricated and cured at 150 \u00b0C under vacuum and...", "direct_quote": "PEVA films containing 18, 24, 33, and 40% VA content with t he necessary additives have been fabricated and cured at 150 \u00b0C under vacuum and subsequently subjected to accelerated damp -heat (85\u25e6C and 85% RH) aging according to IEC 61215 standard for ", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Tensile strength, thermal stability and degree of crosslinking have been found to be greater for PEVA containing lower VA content (18 and 24...", "direct_quote": "Tensile strength, thermal stability and degree of crosslinking have been found to be greater for PEVA containing lower VA content (18 and 24%) and diminished for PEVA with higher VA content (33 and 40%) due to DH aging.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
